untranslatable_reason: Signal requires computing candle height as (highest_high - lowest_low) / breakout_price and comparing to median. The 'range' indicator provides (high - low) but: (1) no median calculation mechanism exists in the rule engine, (2) 'breakout_price' is not defined in allowed indicators and varies by market direction, (3) the divisor selection logic (highest_high vs lowest_low) is dynamic based on breakout direction. These calculations cannot be expressed with allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using range > sma_20 to capture 'tall candles', but this does not accurately represent the normalized height metric described. Exit conditions defaulted to mean-reversion since author provided no guidance. Bear market success rate of 83% noted but cannot be encoded. Signal shows 'dismal performance' overall with sideways price action noted.
